race.name: Marathon du Grand Bec
race.tagline: Forty-two kilometers beneath the Grand Bec summit — a Vanoise Alps skate marathon where glaciated peaks tower over every stride through Champagny's high valley.

vitals.aid_stations: Feed stations with French alpine provisions

climate.description: February at 1450m in the Vanoise Alps brings reliable cold and deep snow. The high valley location provides excellent snow security. Typically -10°C to -1°C. Protected from the worst winds by surrounding peaks but cold air pools in the valley, especially in early morning.
challenges: Cold valley air pooling in early morning starts
High altitude demands acclimatization for lowland skiers
Steep valley terrain can channel winds

course.primary: A 42km skate marathon through the Champagny-en-Vanoise valley at 1450m in the Vanoise Alps. The course sits beneath the Grand Bec (3398m), offering dramatic high-alpine scenery throughout. The terrain follows the valley floor with climbs into side valleys, providing a mix of flat fast sections and grinding ascents. The Vanoise setting — France's first national park — creates an atmosphere of wild alpine grandeur.
course.surface: Machine-groomed skate lanes through high alpine valley
course.grooming: Good French standard with reliable snow base at altitude
features: Set in the Vanoise Alps — France's first national park
Champagny-en-Vanoise is part of the La Plagne ski area
Views of glaciated peaks throughout the course

nordic_lab_rating.score_note: Maximum scenery and snow reliability scores — high-altitude Vanoise setting with views of glaciated 3000m+ peaks. Strong altitude score at 1450m. Good organization as a Marathon Ski Tour event. Field size limits competitive depth, but the alpine setting makes this one of France's most scenic ski marathons.

history.summary: Founded around 1985, the Marathon du Grand Bec is a 42km skate marathon set in Champagny-en-Vanoise in the heart of the Vanoise Alps. Named after the Grand Bec peak (3398m) that dominates the skyline, the race takes place in France's first national park. Part of the Marathon Ski Tour series, it has become one of the most scenic ski marathons in the French Alps. Champagny-en-Vanoise is also connected to the La Plagne ski area, providing excellent infrastructure for a relatively small mountain village.
notable_facts: Named after the Grand Bec summit — 3398m, the valley's dominant peak
Set in the Vanoise National Park — France's first, established 1963
Part of the Marathon Ski Tour series
Champagny-en-Vanoise connects to the La Plagne alpine ski area
One of the highest-altitude ski marathons in the French Alps

youtube_data.search_query: Marathon du Grand Bec cross country ski race Champagny-en-Vanoise

videos.title: [Event] Marathon du Grand Bec 2015 - Champagny en Vanoise
videos.description:
Le marathon du Grand Bec est une grande course populaire de ski nordique. Elle se déroule tous les hivers sur le magnifique plateau de Champagny-le-Haut, en Savoie.
Plusieurs distances sont proposées aux participants: 42km, 21km, 10km, 5km, 3km et 1,5km pour les plus jeunes.

Retrouvez des sportifs de la France entière pour partager un moment de convivialité et pratiquer votre passion dans un site exceptionnel.

Plus d'infos sur : http://www.marathondugrandbec.com/
videos.curation_reason: Official race coverage showing the course layout and race atmosphere at Champagny-le-Haut plateau.

videos.title: Champagny en Vanoise
videos.description: Pralognan La Vanoise descent and climb into Champagny en Vanoise, up through the village and into the beautiful valley beyond where the route up to the Grand Bec (not on a bike!) lies.  Off the usual, well beaten, track for cyclists but a bit special and less traffic.

videos.title: EN GOPRO SUR MON PREMIER MARATHON!! (Marathon du Grand Bec)
videos.description:
Après la victoire sur la Foulée Blanche, je vous remmène en caméra embarquée pour mon premier marathon, à Champagny-en-Vanoise en Savoie, pour la 4e étape du Marathon Ski Tour! 🏁 J'espère que cette vidéo avec Guilhem vous plaira, c'était une belle première expérience, avec de la neige, du soleil, et un beau final! 🍿

0:00 Intro
0:25 Voyages
01:42 Veille de course
02:54 Jour de course
03:34 Mass start 42km Skate
10:53 Récup


🎥 Merci beaucoup à Guilhem pour les images, et à Nils pour m’avoir prêté la Gopro!  


🦾 Merci à mes partenaires:

🗞 YPMédias (http://www.ypmedias.com/)

🏔 Chamrousse (https://www.chamrousse.com/)

🎿 Atomic (https://www.atomic.com/fr-fr)

🥢 Swix (https://www.swixsport.com/fr)

🛼 R17 Rollerskis (https://r17.ski)

🍼 Hydrascore (https://www.hydrascore.fr/)

🕶 ODC Opticiens (https://www.odc-opticiens.com/)

videos.curation_reason: Recent first-person GoPro POV video of the actual Marathon du Grand Bec race experience with detailed race footage.

videos.title: 2015 Bretton Woods Marathon
videos.description: And they're off! The 2015 Bretton Woods Nordic Marathon was held on March 7, 2015 at Omni Mount Washington Resort. This 42-kilometer, classic format, cross-country ski race showcases one of the largest Nordic systems in the northeast.  In the tracks of the famed 1982 US National Championships and such legends as Bill Koch and Tim Caldwell, this race is steeped in history and Nordic skiing tradition.

videos.title: Trail Grand Bec 2010 -  Trail Alpin
videos.description:
Le "Trail alpin du Grand Bec"... une évolution du célèbre "Cross Alpin du Grand Bec" :

+ long, + "roulant", + de dénivelé ! 
Course en montagne sur pistes et sentiers, agréée et inscrite au calendrier de la Fédération Française d'Athlétisme.
Distance : 20km, dénivelé + : 1874m, dénivelé - : 1624m

+ Randonnée : parcours de marche sur sentier - Ouvert à tous !

videos.title: The Craftsbury Marathon 2012
videos.description: The biggest Cross Country Skiing event in Vermont is the annual Craftsbury Marathon. It attracts hundreds of skiers. Unfortunately the winter of 2011-2012 did not bring a lot of snow. The organizers had to reduce the length of the 25 km and 50 km courses due to insufficient snow. Instead, the race was conducted over a shorter course which the contestants had to ski, once, twice or three times. Still, the course did afford some picturesque countryside and the weather on the day of the race, January 28th, was nice. Film with Canon DSLRs

videos.title: 100-year-old and 102-year-old runners break world records
videos.description:
102-year-old Julia "Hurricane" Hawkins and 100-year-old Orville Rogers just broke world records in track and field events. How do they do it? "I have a determination to hang in there. Keep going. Never give up," Rogers has said.
